message:
fix: extractSummary uses findLast, populate isError on tool results

Review found two issues:
- extractSummary returned first summary instead of last (real sessions
  accumulate multiple summaries, last is most current)
- isError was never mapped from ToolResultBlock.is_error to ParsedMessage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
